narrative:
Canal Fulton A (precinct in Stark County) has 674 registered voters, with 56.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.9 percentage points.
